changeSet.author: hisab-erp
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE allocations ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), tenant_id UUID NOT NULL, party_id UUID NOT NULL, positive_type VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, positive_id UUID NOT NULL, negative_type VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, negative_id UUID NOT NULL, amount NUMERIC(19,2) NOT NULL CHECK (amount > 0), allocated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), notes VARCHAR(500), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by UUID, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_by UUID, version BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 );
CREATE INDEX idx_allocations_party ON allocations(party_id); CREATE INDEX idx_allocations_positive ON allocations(positive_type, positive_id); CREATE INDEX idx_allocations_negative ON allocations(negative_type, negative_id); CREATE INDEX idx_allocations_tenant ON allocations(tenant_id);

changeSet.author: hisab-erp
